title: Share a Google Drive folder with view access
goal: Create a new folder in Google Drive named 'AgentBench-K reports' and share it with view-only access for a given email.
rubric: Confirms folder 'AgentBench-K reports' exists with a viewer share.
final_answer: Created folder 'AgentBench-K reports' in Drive root, shared with the requested email at Viewer permission. Share link: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<id>.
